rationale: Both correctly diagnose the deploy-config mismatch (Base tokenizer lacks <img_ratio_33..36>) and reproduce the thread's workaround, matching akshatvishu/FayeSpica. Y is more grounded, quoting actual header lines from both deploy YAMLs to justify why one path touches AR init and the other doesn't, and proposes a concrete degrade-gracefully code fix rather than X's vaguer 'add a guard' suggestion. Y also explicitly addresses Gaohan123's closing request to track the improvement in a new issue and frames the bug report itself as resolved via workaround, which matches the actual thread resolution more precisely than X's ending, which omits this final maintainer action.
